description.value:
Small-folk trapcraft marks — the Tonttu notch their tools with a finder's mark that makes the tool want to find trouble before trouble finds the holder; on a blade, this becomes an uncanny aptitude for locating pressure-plates and trip-lines.

Effect: You gain an edge on tests made to detect or disable mundane traps when you use this weapon as part of your toolkit for the task (Director adjudicates).

Rules: Edge; Tests.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of at least basic quality; a Tonttu finder's mark — given, never purchased
